subject: Sporedome
fact: The party arrives at Sporedome to meet Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: The party arrives at Sporedome where they meet Solom Ned'razak

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this hurries the characters to the encampment.
source_quote: Xaven Tanor'this hurries the characters to the encampment

subject: drow
fact: Several drow welcome Xaven Tanor'this at the encampment.
source_quote: where he is welcomed by several of the drow

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak steps forward wearing a fresh set of finely crafted purple robes trimmed with silver.
source_quote: wearing a fresh set of finely crafted purple robes trimmed with silver

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak remembers the party from his rescue from Szith Morcane.
source_quote: Solom remembers them from his rescue from Szith Morcane

subject: research session
fact: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this head to a large tent to do research.
source_quote: Solom and Xaven head to a large tent to do research

subject: elapsed time
fact: The party spends two days in Sporedome.
source_quote: The party spends two days in Sporedome

subject: interruption of Solom
fact: The party interrupts Solom Ned'razak after the first day.
source_quote: the party wants to interrupt Solom Ned'razak. They do

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak becomes furious when interrupted.
source_quote: he's furious

subject: recruitment attempt
fact: The party attempts to recruit Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: The party attempts to recruit Solom

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak rejects the party's offer to join them.
source_quote: He rejects their offer

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak states he is indispensable to survival.
source_quote: explaining that he's indispensable to survival

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak claims he will find other adventurers if the party dies.
source_quote: If they die, he will find other adventurers

subject: mushroom hunt
fact: The party goes after the mind protecting mushrooms found previously in Sporedome.
source_quote: the party goes after the mind protecting mushrooms that they found last time in Sporedome

subject: mushroom discovery
fact: The party finds a lot more mind protecting mushrooms than expected.
source_quote: They find a lot more. Surprisingly

subject: Daein
fact: Daein complains that the need for a store has gone now that they are heroes of Hillsfar.
source_quote: Daein complains that now that they are heroes of Hillsfar, the need for a store has gone

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the leader of the drow.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak, leader of the drow

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak states they need the blood of a living fire giant to complete a ritual.
source_quote: We need the blood of a living fire giant in order to complete the ritual

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this trails behind Solom Ned'razak and wrings his hands nervously.
source_quote: Behind him trails Xaven, nervous judging by the number of times he wrings his hands

subject: ritual explanation
fact: The ritual to remove demon taint requires the blood of a living fire giant with fiendish blood.
source_quote: specifically one with the blood of a fiend coursing through its veins

subject: map of Maerimydra
fact: Solom Ned'razak provides the characters a map of Maerimydra that is slightly outdated.
source_quote: Solom provides the characters a map of Maerimydra- -albeit slightly outdated

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is a powerful fiendish giantess who is the leader of Maerimydra.
source_quote: their leader, a powerful fiendish giantess named Hledh

subject: fire giants
fact: The fire giants keep the gates of Maerimydra heavily guarded and locked at all times.
source_quote: keeps the gates heavily guarded and locked at all times

subject: Shattered Tower
fact: The archmage built a secret tunnel out of the Shattered Tower.
source_quote: The archmage built a secret tunnel out of the Shattered Tower

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this worked with the archmage in the Shattered Tower when Maerimydra was a drow city.
source_quote: Xaven worked with the archmage in the city's Shattered Tower

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the only survivor of Maerimydra who knows of the secret entrance.
source_quote: Xaven is the only survivor of Maerimydra that knows of the secret entrance

subject: Kurgoth Hellspawn
fact: Kurgoth Hellspawn and the fire giants demolished the Shattered Tower.
source_quote: Kurgoth Hellspawn and the fire giants demolished the Shattered Tower

subject: city takeover
fact: The fire giants took over Maerimydra a century ago.
source_quote: when they took the city over a century ago

subject: secret tunnel exit
fact: The secret tunnel exited into the Underdark four miles from Maerimydra.
source_quote: The tunnel exited into the Underdark four miles from Maerimydra

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The fire giants built an outpost at the tunnel exit without realizing its significance.
source_quote: the fire giants built an outpost at the exit without realizing the significance of their construction

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: Black Ember Outpost is one of several outlying strongholds the fire giants use to maintain control over the region.
source_quote: Black Ember Outpost, the name of the outpost over the tunnel,  is one of several outlying strongholds the fire giants use to maintain control over the region

subject: secret tunnel entrance
fact: The tunnel is found in the southern-most portion of a large pool beneath the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: The tunnel is found in the southern-most portion of a large pool beneath the outpost

subject: tunnel status
fact: Solom Ned'razak hopes the tunnel has not been blocked by time or the giants.
source_quote: Solom hopes that it has not been blocked by time or the giants

subject: demon threat discussion
fact: Solom Ned'razak explains that demon-infused fire giants would likely destroy the Overbright.
source_quote: Solom explains that the demon infused fire giants would likely destroy the Overbright

subject: Daein
fact: Daein and the rest of the party agree to help after remembering the danger of demonically empowered Fire Giants.
source_quote: Daein and the rest of the party remembers how dangerous a few Fire Giants are, never mind demonically empowered Fire Giants and agree

subject: second recruitment attempt
fact: Daein tries to get Solom Ned'razak to join the party.
source_quote: Daein tries to get Solom to join them

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak rejects the offer because he is essential while the party is replaceable.
source_quote: Solom rejects the offer because he is essential, whereas they are important but replaceable

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak notes he did not become powerful by taking the wrong kind of risks.
source_quote: Solom also notes that he didn't become this powerful by taking the wrong kind of risks

subject: plan alignment
fact: The party learns that the plan to save Felkur and the plan to find the Fire Giants can work together.
source_quote: they learn it can

subject: capture plan
fact: The party proposes a plan to shrink the giant, stuff it in a portable hole, and add a breathing apparatus.
source_quote: They propose a plan to shrink the giant, stuff in a portable hole and add a breathing apparatus to the portable hole

subject: demon blood clarification
fact: The party learns not all giants are imbued with demon blood.
source_quote: They learn not all giants are imbued with demon blood

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: Solom Ned'razak observes there is a tower called The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning that has a portal.
source_quote: Solom observes there is a tower, The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning, that has a portal

subject: portal
fact: The portal has a green light glowing from it that was visible to all.
source_quote: The portal had a green light glowing from it that was visible to all

subject: Sporedome encampment
fact: The tunnel opens up into a vast cavern at Sporedome.
source_quote: The tunnel opens up into a vast cavern

subject: fungal forest
fact: A great fungal forest spreads out in the Sporedome cavern with stalks reaching heights of 20 feet and beyond.
source_quote: A great fungal forest spreads out on the ground as far as you can see, with some stalks reaching heights of 20 feet and beyond

subject: Sporedome lake
fact: Dim waters of a large lake are surrounded by the fungus in Sporedome.
source_quote: you can see the dim waters of a large lake surrounded by the fungus

subject: drow
fact: Several hundred feet to the east of the lake, tents have been erected in a hastily built camp in Sporedome.
source_quote: Several hundred feet to the east, tents have been erected in a hastily built camp

subject: myconids
fact: A large colony of myconids resides in the fungal forest of Sporedome.
source_quote: The fungal forest is also resident to a large colony of myconids

subject: drow-myconid relations
fact: The drow and the myconid have not yet engaged in any talks in Sporedome.
source_quote: The drow and the myconid have not yet engaged in any talks

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: In a cave under the Black Ember Outpost is a lake and the entrance to the secret passageway into Maerimydra.
source_quote: In an cave under the outpost is a lake and the entrance to the secret passageway into Maerimydra

subject: Pathway of Shadows
fact: The Pathway of Shadows is a secret pathway that Solom Ned'razak built to leave the Shattered Tower and Maerimydra undetected.
source_quote: A secret pathway that Solom Ned'razak built to leave the Shattered Tower and Maerimydra undetected

subject: Shattered Tower
fact: The Shattered Tower is the location in Maerimydra where the Pathway of Shadows ends.
source_quote: Location in Maerimydra where the Pathway of Shadows ends

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: The Shattered Tower was the old tower of Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: Old tower of Solom Ned'razak
